name: Fruitful Hook
description: Bold Burkina from the Scions of the Canopy once made this weapon with the hero Tenoch's help — all for the sake of obtaining Flamegranates unmatched throughout Natlan.

upgrades.description: Increase Plunging Attack CRIT Rate by 16%; After a Plunging Attack hits an opponent, Normal, Charged, and Plunging Attack DMG increased by 16% for 10s.

Increase Plunging Attack CRIT Rate by 28%; After a Plunging Attack hits an opponent, Normal, Charged, and Plunging Attack DMG increased by 28% for 10s.
